---
title: "Day 1: Foundations and introduction to models"
---

## Program {.unnumbered}

- **Lecture:** Historical and philosophical perspectives on (mechanistic) scientific simulation models in biodiversity research.
- **Break**
- **Lecture:** Critical overview of `gen3sis`: mechanistic modelling of eco-evolutionary processes.
- **Lunch Break**
- **Practical:** Creating and managing simulated landscapes in `gen3sis`.
- **Break**
- **Practical:** Formulating and coding eco-evolutionary processes in `gen3sis`.

## Core material used {.unnumbered}

- CBA setup and basics:
  - [Day1_Prac1_setup.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac1_setup.qmd)
  - [Day1_Prac2_basics.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac2_basics.qmd)
  - [Day1_Prac3_islands.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day1_Prac3_islands.qmd)
- YoMos workshop foundations:
  - [gen3sis_workshop.qmd](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/gen3sis_workshop.qmd) (Sections 1–2)
- Day 1 configuration references:
  - [config_islands_Day1Prac1.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_Day1Prac1.R)
  - [config_southamerica_Day1Prac1.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_southamerica_Day1Prac1.R)
  - [config_simple.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/config/config_simple.R)
